final_response: User reported a recurring contractor onboarding delay: IT access provisioning takes ~4 days, observed in Feb/Mar/Apr cycles. Root cause: backend system lag on external contractor credentials. Routing decision: escalate to ops/security team with pattern data (3 incidents, consistent 4-day delay). Recommended action: implement contractor pre-provisioning or expedited access workflow.

actions.description: Identified multi-incident pattern in contractor access provisioning
Detected 3 occurrences (Feb, Mar, Apr) with consistent 4-day delay window
Classified as ops/security systemic issue requiring escalation, not individual incident

notes: Observation is meta-level: user flagging process gap, not reporting single incident
Pattern suggests process/policy issue, not technical bug
Recommended recipient: ops team lead or IT process owner, with pattern evidence
